title: RankPlugin with luckperms
description: Built-in Ranks, customizable chat and tab prefixes, and adds luckperm support
body:
RankPlugin: The Ultimate Rank Manager ⚡ A Powerful, All-in-One Solution for Server Ranking Tired of juggling multiple plugins to manage your server's ranks? RankPlugin offers a robust, feature-packed solution built on the power of LuckPerms.

From creating dynamic rank prefixes, RankPlugin simplifies your staff's workflow and elevates the player experience.

✨ Key Features 💻 Deep LuckPerms Integration (Required) RankPlugin is built as an extension to the leading permissions manager.

Directly manages all LuckPerms groups and prefixes.

Ensures a stable and reliable foundation for all your server permissions.

🛡️ Enhanced Player Display Give your community a premium feel with built-in cosmetic features:

Nametag Health Display: Optionally show players' current health directly under their nametags (utilizes a ScoreboardManager).

Rank Prefixes: Works seamlessly with your LuckPerms prefixes to display ranks clearly in chat and nametags.

⚙️ Comprehensive Rank Management Commands Manage your entire rank structure easily in-game.

Create new ranks with custom prefixes.

Safely delete ranks—the plugin checks and prevents deletion if players are currently assigned to prevent loss of data.

Highly Customizable: Every message, setting, and default rank is configurable in the config.yml.

LuckPerms REQUIRED This is the core permissions manager that RankPlugin relies on for all group and prefix management. Vault REQUIRED Needed to enable all tiered economy features (money rewards) and ensure compatibility with most chat and economy plugins.

----------------------------------

Setup Instructions
----------------------

Stop your server.

Ensure both LuckPerms and Vault are installed in your plugins folder.

Download RankPlugin.jar and place it in your plugins folder.

Start and stop the server to generate the initial config.yml.

Edit the config.yml to set up your rank prefixes, economy reward amounts, and default rank.

Start your server!

---------------------

📜 Full Command Reference
---------------------------
set /rank set <player> <rank> Sets a player's permanent rank.

temp /rank temp <player> <rank> <duration> Sets a player's temporary rank. Duration examples: 1h, 3d, 2w.

promote /rank promote <player> Promotes a player to the next rank in the defined hierarchy.

demote /rank demote <player> Demotes a player to the previous rank in the defined hierarchy.

info /rank info <player> Views a player's current rank, including temporary rank status and remaining time.

remove /rank remove <player> Removes a player's custom rank and sets them back to the configured default rank.

list /rank list Lists all available ranks defined in the configuration.

listplayers /rank listplayers <rank> Lists all players currently assigned to a specific rank.

create /rank create <rank_name> <prefix> Creates a new rank group and defines its chat prefix.

delete /rank delete <rank_name> Deletes an existing rank group.

reload /rank reload Reloads the plugin configuration from the config.yml.

---------------------------

🔑 Permissions
----------------
rankplugin.admin Allows full access to all rank management commands. op

rankplugin.mod Allows access to moderator-level rank commands. false

rankplugin.member Default permissions for the 'Member' rank. true

rankplugin.vip Permissions for VIP players. false

rankplugin.guest Permissions for guests/new players. true

rankplugin.* Grants all rank plugin permissions. op
